prompt: Extremely ultra-realistic photograph with absolute photographic precision — indistinguishable from a real photograph taken by a professional documentary photographer. A beautiful radiant shaman healer is performing an intimate sacred blessing ritual on another person. The shaman is the same exact woman from the reference images — same face reproduced with forensic photographic accuracy, same warm radiant skin with visible pores, natural fine lines, real skin texture. She wears the same exact colorful handmade crocheted poncho with vivid rainbow V-shaped horizontal stripes in pink, hot pink, emerald green, blue, sky blue, golden yellow, red, crimson, purple, violet, and white, with colorful multicolored crocheted tassels along the bottom edge, visible crocheted open-stitch yarn texture. Same white wrapped turban with the golden braided band and turquoise-green oval gemstone at the forehead. Same cowrie shell bracelet. SCENE: She stands behind and slightly to the side of a person she is blessing — the person receiving the blessing is seen from behind, showing their shoulders, neck and back of head. The person receiving has natural dark hair, wearing simple white clothing, their head slightly bowed in reverence and surrender, eyes closed, receiving the sacred healing energy. The shaman holds a thick lush bundle of fresh sacred herbs — arruda (rue), rosemary, basil, and green healing leaves — in her right hand, and she is gently touching and brushing the herbs against the top of the person's head and shoulders, transferring the sacred plant energy and healing vibration directly into their body and soul. Her left hand hovers just above the person's crown of the head, palm facing down, channeling energy from above through her hand into the person. Her expression is one of intense spiritual focus, deep maternal love, compassion, and sacred concentration — her eyes are half-closed in prayer, her lips whispering ancient healing words, her entire being radiating unconditional love and divine healing power. You can feel the sacredness of this moment — a soul being healed by ancient plant medicine and the pure love of a healer connected to Mother Earth. ENERGY EFFECTS: Subtle but visible wisps of luminous green and golden light flow from the sacred herb bundle where it touches the person's head — the healing energy transferring from the plants through the shaman into the person's soul, like gentle luminous tendrils of emerald-green light merging into the person's aura. A soft warm golden glow surrounds both figures, connecting them in a shared field of sacred energy. Gentle god rays of golden sunlight filter through the tropical palm canopy behind them, creating a warm divine backlight. Golden particles float softly in the air between them. The energy effects are SUBTLE and REALISTIC — not overwhelming, just enough to show the invisible sacred transfer happening. The scene feels real, intimate, sacred, and deeply moving. The tropical garden setting with palm fronds creates a natural temple. Shot on professional DSLR, 85mm lens, f/2.0, ISO 200. Camera positioned at a three-quarter angle, capturing both the shaman's loving focused face and the person's bowed head receiving the blessing. Medium-shallow depth of field, both figures sharp, background softly blurred. Natural golden hour light. Documentary realism with subtle sacred energy. This must look like a real photograph of a real blessing ceremony — the Benção Sagrada do Cantuá — with just a whisper of visible spiritual energy to show what the naked eye cannot see.
